name: codex-continuity
description: Full Codex memory enhancement bundle. Adds structured ad-hoc capture, prior-session retrieval, and read-only prompt-time session context over the stock memories workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Full capture and retrieval tooling for Codex memory.
interface.longDescription: Adds three layers on top of stock Codex memory without modifying codex-rs: a capture skill that writes structured ad-hoc notes to ~/.codex/memories/extensions/ad_hoc/notes/, a retrieval MCP sidecar that exposes project summary, search, related-file lookup, recent-decision lookup, session context, note draft, and workspace status tools, and a read-only UserPromptSubmit hook that injects relevant prior session context through additionalContext. The stock Phase 2 consolidation pipeline still owns durable MEMORY.md and memory_summary.md updates; this plugin enhances capture and retrieval around that pipeline rather than replacing it.
defaultPrompt: Finish this task, capture the root cause, and use memory retrieval when prior context may help.
Fix this bug, save a structured ad-hoc memory note, and search related files and past decisions in memory.
